name: Cheeseburger Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beef, diced bell pepper, and pressed garlic in a skillet.
Cook through until no longer pink.
2. Drain the skillet and add all but 1/2 of the shredded cheese.
Stir over medium heat until the remaining cheese is melted.
Allow to cool completely.
3. Fill freezer bags with the cooled mixture.
4. To serve, remove from the bag and thaw if frozen.
Pour into a baking dish, top with the reserved cheese,
and bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes or until heated through.
